/usr/local/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/groove_forge.dir/groove_forge_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/groove_forge.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/groove_forge.dir/src/app/GrooveController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/groove_forge.dir/src/audio/JackEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/groove_forge.dir/src/dsp/BassVoice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/groove_forge.dir/src/dsp/DrumVoice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/groove_forge.dir/src/generation/PatternGenerator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/groove_forge.dir/src/recording/AudioRecorder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/groove_forge.dir/src/sample/SampleBuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/groove_forge.dir/src/sample/SampleVoice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/groove_forge.dir/src/ui/MainWindow.cpp.o -o groove_forge  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/qt5/lib /opt/qt5/lib/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.0 /opt/qt5/lib/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.0 /opt/qt5/lib/libQt5Core.so.5.15.0 /usr/lib/libjack.so /usr/lib/libsndfile.so -lpthread
